message:
feat(tests): add 21 new enrichment integration test suites (~25k lines)

Add enrichment integration tests for 21 subsystems not previously
covered by dedicated test files:

- allocation_elision_gate: elision decision contracts, budget tracking
- bayesian_posterior: prior updates, credible intervals, convergence
- benchmark_denominator: normalization, outlier rejection, stability
- conformance_catalog: catalog lifecycle, rule registration, verdicts
- demo_claim_linkage_gate: claim linking, evidence chain integrity
- deterministic_replay: replay fidelity, divergence detection
- engine_object_id: ID generation, uniqueness, serialization
- entropy_evidence_compressor: compression ratio, decompression fidelity
- fleet_convergence: convergence detection, quorum, partition tolerance
- hardware_code_layout_governance: layout policy, alignment enforcement
- hardware_parameter_manifold: parameter spaces, interpolation
- ifc_provenance_index: information flow tracking, taint propagation
- interleaving_explorer: schedule enumeration, race detection
- proof_release_gate: proof verification, release gating
- proof_schema: schema validation, evolution compatibility
- proof_specialization_receipt: specialization evidence, receipt chains
- regexp_string_governance_gate: pattern safety, ReDoS prevention
- resource_certificate_governance_gate: cert lifecycle, revocation
- s3_fifo_cache_gate: eviction policy, hit rate contracts
- simd_lexer: vectorized tokenization, fallback correctness
- storage_adapter: backend abstraction, consistency contracts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
